hero.subheadline: We build websites that evolve with your business—custom design, modern tech, and a process that gets you live in days.

whatWeDo.label: What we do
whatWeDo.title: Services that answer
whatWeDo.subtitle: Three core offerings—scannable, clear, and priced so you know where you stand.

services.title: Local Business Sites
services.description: Professional, mobile-friendly sites that bring in local customers and work on any device.

services.title: E-commerce
services.description: Online stores that sell. Secure checkout, inventory, and a smooth shopping experience.

services.title: Portfolio & Personal Brand
services.description: Stand-out portfolios and personal sites that get you noticed and land the right opportunities.

whyUs.label: Why choose us
whyUs.title: Why
whyUs.subtitle: The "why you over anyone else"—speed, tech, design, and scale.

items.title: Fast turnaround
items.description: Sites delivered in days, not weeks. We use smart workflows so you get live sooner.

items.title: AI-powered workflow
items.description: Cutting-edge tools and automation—efficiency we pass on as savings and speed.

items.title: Custom design
items.description: Never a generic template. Your site is designed for your brand and your goals.

items.title: Built to grow
items.description: Scalable from day one. Add pages, features, and traffic without starting over.

howItWorks.label: Our process
howItWorks.title: How it
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple 3-step process—keeps it non-intimidating for non-technical clients.

steps.title: Brief
steps.description: You tell us about your business and goals. We ask a few questions and agree the scope—no jargon, no overwhelm.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: We design and develop your site, fast. You see progress and give feedback so the result is exactly what you need.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: Go live with a full handover and support. You own everything—we make sure you're confident using it.

portfolio.label: Our work
portfolio.title: Selected
portfolio.subtitle: Recent projects—replace with real case studies as you complete client work.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Three clean
pricing.subtitle: Choose the tier that fits. Each includes 4–5 clear inclusions—no surprises.

items.quote: Evolution Media got our site live in under two weeks. Professional, clear communication, and the result looks exactly how we wanted.
items.author: Client

items.quote: We needed a store that felt like our brand—not a generic template. They delivered. Sales are up and we're already planning phase two.
items.author: Client

items.quote: Fast turnaround, fair price, and a site that actually converts. Would recommend to anyone looking for a no-fuss, quality build.
items.author: Client

items.question: How long does a typical project take?
items.answer: Portfolio and local business sites: 1–2 weeks. E-commerce: 2–4 weeks. We work in sprints and keep you updated throughout.

items.question: What tech do you use?
items.answer: We build with Next.js, React, and Tailwind—modern, fast, and easy to maintain. Hosting is typically Vercel or similar for speed and reliability.

items.question: Do you offer ongoing support?
items.answer: Yes. Every project includes handover and basic support. We can arrange ongoing maintenance or retainer packages if you need them.

items.question: Can you work with my existing site?
items.answer: Yes. We do redesigns, migrations, and add-ons. Share what you have and we'll propose the best approach.

items.question: What if I need changes after launch?
items.answer: Each tier includes revision rounds. After that, we can do ad-hoc updates or set up a maintenance plan—we'll agree this before we start.
